description: National annual series are from the World Bank Open Data API. Subnational (first-level) population and economic values for choropleth mapping are from official regional statistics in marketing metadata (e.g. national statistical service) and `data.csv`; the World Bank series does not provide per-marz panels.

subnational.note: One long-format `data.csv`: name_en, name_local, svg_id, year, population, area_km2, value. Static map uses latest year in the file or `meta.dataset_year` when that year exists.

showcase_generation.note: Showcase images from `scripts/generate-showcase-assets.mjs`: `data.csv` + map SVG. GIF/WebM: multi-year → last two years; else high/low region for the display year.
